## coa sysinstall

Launch the graphical system installer (Calamares + OA)

### Synopsis

The 'sysinstall' command prepares the environment and launches 
the Calamares graphical installer. Once the GUI finishes partitioning 
and unpacking, the OA engine will take over to finalize the bootloader.

```
coa sysinstall [flags]
```

### Examples

```
  # Launch the system installer
  sudo coa sysinstall
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for sysinstall
```
